screenshot_evidence.notes: Figma MCP board screenshot after v3 text and layout fixes.

checks.evidence: All 6 route screens exist in Figma.
Checked 176 text nodes; no visible text below 80% expected line-height.
Checked 176 text nodes; all fit inside parent bounds.
Checked sibling groups across 6 screens; no significant overlaps.
Checked 342 nodes; all visible descendants fit screen bounds.
Top-level content respects 34px safe area on all screens.
IR records local components with deviation; no claim of published DS instances.
Density is not quantified in verifier v1.
Hierarchy reviewed via screenshot QA and route contract in verifier v1.
No before/after systemization inventory was provided.

known_deviations: button: Built as local shadcn-like primitive inside the DS file.
card: Built as local shadcn-like primitive inside the DS file.
badge: Built as local shadcn-like primitive inside the DS file.
tabs: Built as local shadcn-like primitive inside the DS file.
checkbox: Local checkbox resized to 24px after verifier found icon overflow.

design_system: v3 board is built inside the user-provided shadcn/Tailwind variables community file. It uses local Auto Layout primitives and local variables/styles; published DS instances are not claimed as complete reuse.
